metadata.description: Gemini inside Claude Code. Second opinions, web-grounded facts, image generation, code visualization, brainstorms.

plugins.name: gemini
plugins.description: Gemini inside Claude Code. Ask questions, get second opinions, web-ground facts via Google Search, generate images, visualize code as diagrams, run 3-round adversarial brainstorms. Use when user says 'ask Gemini', 'second opinion', 'ground this', 'verify', 'generate image', 'visualize', 'diagram', 'brainstorm with Gemini', or needs a different model's perspective.
